name: Highway Traffic Racer : Car racing game

reviews.review_description: The graphics on the interior of the car are terrible very flat. There's no shift control, both of the side mirrors and rear view mirror, non-existent. The screen that looks like a map is just a flat washed-out color picture.🧐 Colliding with other vehicles, nothing spectacular, it's just a hit, and you continue on. 🤔The outskirts of the map look pretty good. The vehicles look good, but the wheels don't move while in motion. It's no biggie, though. I love the countdown sound bite. Navigating on the menu is clear and precise. keep up the good work 👍 😎

developer_response.body:
Hi ThatOneGamer1021!

Thank you so much for the detailed feedback and the 4⭐ rating — we truly appreciate your thoughtful review! 🙏

We’re really glad you enjoyed the gameplay, countdown sound, and smooth menu navigation — that means a lot to our team. 💪

You’ve highlighted some excellent points, and we’re already working to improve them:
🚗 Car Interiors & Mirrors: We’re enhancing the interior visuals and adding functional side and rear-view mirrors for a more realistic cockpit experience.
🛞 Vehicle Animation: The wheel rotation and impact effects are being refined to make collisions and motion feel more dynamic.
🗺️ Dashboard Screen: We’ll be updating the map display with real-time visuals and better lighting for added immersion.

We’re passionate about making Highway Traffic Racer the best it can be, and feedback like yours helps us get there faster. We’d love for you to check out these improvements once they go live — and if you enjoy the updates, we’d be thrilled if you’d consider updating your rating to ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ - 5 Star.

Thanks again for being part of our journey and helping us make the game even better! 🚀
– The KSGameStudio Team
